description: V1 baseline reproduced: VREF=1.241V TC=37.8ppm PSRR=73dB. 3 specs fail 25% margin.
Cascode OTA: headroom failure, diff pair in triode. Abandoned.
Two-stage OTA: polarity error then convergence issues. Abandoned.
Resistive startup: VDD-to-VREF path killed PSRR (53dB). Removed.
Parametric sweep: found wp_pass=20u dramatically improves PSRR.
Optimized: wp=20u Ra=122u Rptat=12.5u. Min margin=35.2%. All 25%+ pass.
Robustness test v1: OTA params 93% pass.
OTA improved: Ln=3u Lp=5u Rb=350u Rc=8k. Min margin=41.6%. PSRR=85.1dB.
Robustness test v2: higher margins, more PSRR-sensitive.
